---
name: Supported file format request
about: Ask for import/export support for a 3D file format
title: "[Format] "
labels: file-format, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Format

- Name / extension: [e.g. STEP / .step]
- Import, export, or both?

## Use case

Why do you need this format? Where do your files come from (slicer, CAD tool, scanner)?

## Sample file

Attach a small representative file if you can (respecting any licensing).

## Notes

- STEP/IGES are on the roadmap via Blender/FreeCAD and are intentionally deferred from the
  MVP — confirm whether that path works for you.
- For mesh formats, note whether the files are typically watertight and their rough
  triangle counts.
